title: Dutch auction can be manipulated
description: Attacker prevents _endAuction() by committing maxCommitments-1 wei; buys at average price
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: Partial - M-04 covers performUpkeep no end validation

title: Inefficiency in Dutch Auction due to lower duration
description: Quadratic price curve doesn't reach reserve price until full duration
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - Chainlink uses linear decay correctly

title: Governance can refuse to refund Dutch Auction participants
description: setFinalPrice() lets governance block refunds
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - different auction model (NFT)

title: Users may overpay because finalPrice must be manually set
description: Manual price setting after incomplete auction causes overpayment
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - prices are oracle-based

title: LPDA price can underflow due to bad settings
description: elapsed*dropPerSecond > startPrice causes underflow
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - Solidity 0.8 checked arithmetic; mulDiv safe

title: No bidder incentive except last-minute MEV due to fixed endBlock
description: Fixed end block means rational bidders wait until last moment
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: Partial - inherent Dutch auction property; not a code bug

title: Malicious auction winner can lock losing bidder's funds
description: Winner's callback locks funds of other participants
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - bid() is per-user; no multi-party funds at risk

title: No slippage protection for Market functions
description: buy()/sell() have no minAmountOut/maxAmountIn parameter
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES - bid() has no maxAssetOutAmount

title: Missing slippage and deadline in buyToken() VRGDA
description: VRGDA buy function lacks slippage/deadline protection
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES - bid() has no maxAssetOutAmount or deadline

title: Last bidder can win by force-sending ETH via selfdestruct
description: selfdestruct sends ETH to bypass bid logic
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - auction uses ERC20 not ETH; no receive()

title: creditMultiplier updates prevent bidding on pre-existing auctions
description: External state change (bad debt) makes existing auctions unbiddable
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: Partial - M-01/M-03 cover oracle state blocking bids

title: Bad debt forces other loans in auction to create bad debt
description: One auction's failure cascades to others via shared state
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - auctions are independent per asset

title: bid() DOS via underflow in second phase
description: creditMultiplier change causes underflow in bid calculation
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - Solidity 0.8 checked; oracle prices validated

title: Auction manipulation via block stuffing and ERC-777 hooks
description: ERC-777 transfer hooks used to manipulate auction timing
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - non-canonical ERC20s explicitly OOS

title: Dutch auctions fail to settle due to unexpected collateral behavior
description: One collateral's revert blocks all auction settlements
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES - M-03 covers reverting feed blocking all operations

title: Liquidators can bid even if vault became overcollateralized
description: Auction continues even when no longer needed
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: Partial - checkUpkeep/performUpkeep TOCTOU is inherent

title: Attacker bypasses isValidSignature for arbitrary transactions
description: Crafted signature returns magic value from attacker contract
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - hash is verified against GPv2Order.hash()

title: depositIntoStrategyWithSignature fails for counterfactual wallets
description: isValidSignature fails for not-yet-deployed contracts
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - auction contract is always deployed

title: isValidSignature not compatible with Gnosis Safe
description: Signature validation incompatible with certain smart wallets
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: No - isValidSignature is for CowSwap orders only

title: transmit() accepts future-dated price reports
description: No upper bound check on report.observationsTimestamp
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES - FutureTimestamp PoC exists but not numbered

title: Shared stalenessThreshold for dual oracle
description: Single threshold makes fallback dead or primary too lenient
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES

title: Reverting data feed blocks all operations
description: No try-catch on latestRoundData() causes total DOS
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES

title: performUpkeep no end validation
description: endedAuctions array not re-validated against actual conditions
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES

title: isValidSignature bypasses minBidUsdValue
description: CowSwap path has no minimum bid check unlike bid()
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES

title: bid() lacks slippage protection
description: No maxAssetOutAmount parameter for direct bidders
applicable_to_chainlink_v2: YES
